templates.name: Why am I still getting charged for shipping with my discount code?
templates.content: The discount amount is given as a bulk discount, which is the percentage off the order plus the shipping amount combined since we are unable to leave the freight line at zero.

templates.name: What is the quickest way to exchange?
templates.content: The quickest way to receive an exchange is to place a brand new order so it can get shipped out right away and send the other items back for a refund.

templates.name: What does the A, B, and C on the widths mean?
templates.content: The width A, B and C are Narrow, Medium and Wide width. Let me know if you have any other questions!

templates.name: Do you have any figure skating products?
templates.content: I'm afraid we don't currently have any products for figure skating.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.discountdance.com/order_status2.php

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at cs@discountdance.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn dance dollar coupons to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.discountdance.com/rewards.php

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-3 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS or FedEx. Once shipped it will take 3-5 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help! I'd recommend taking a look at the Fit and Sizing information on each product page. If you're still unsure, just let me know!

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/discountdance/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/discountdance

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://support.discountdance.com/support/solutions/articles/6000031754-return-policy

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://discountdance.happyreturns.com/

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We don't currently offer free shipping, but all promos will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at cs@discountdance.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at cs@discountdance.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out!

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://discountdance.com/dancewear/last-chance-sale/page1

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-800-328-7107, Monday through Friday 7am - 1pm PST, or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://discountdance.com/dancewear/last-chance-sale/page1

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://www.discountdance.com/sizechart.php

templates.name: How do I tell the vamp on the shoes?
templates.content: The vamp is the front length of the shoe. We do not have measurements for vamps. Our descriptions will usually state if the vamp is long (for long toes), or short (for short toes).

templates.name: Update or edit payment method
templates.content: Unfortunately, we're unable to update credit card information through chat or email. Feel free to give us a call at 1-800-328-7107, Monday through Friday 7am - 1pm PST to have the information corrected or updated.

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: Please allow 3 business days from receipt at our warehouse in Forty Fort, PA for your return to be processed and a refund to be issued by Discount Dance. The date that your bank issues and posts the credit to your account will be governed by their respective policy usually within 7-10 business days.

templates.name: Account Inquiries
templates.content: Please email purchasing@discountdance.com for all account inquiries. Our team is more than happy to help out!

templates.name: Do your shoes come in a box?
templates.content: Please note that not all the shoes come in a box and most will come in a bag. I'm afraid boxes tend to get destroyed during transit.

templates.name: Custom inquiries
templates.content: Please email us at custom@discountdance.com and our team will be more than happy to assist you with this!
